name: Twelfth Street Players
description: The Twelfth Street Players were founded in 1976 by Eddie Sowa and Freddy Guera as a predominantly Italian street gang in Cicero, Illinois, taking their name from Roosevelt Road's alternative designation as 12th Street. The gang served as a protective force at Cicero's northern border and was aligned with the People Nation alliance from circa 1981 to 2000 or later, with notable connections to Italian organized crime figures in the Cicero area.

sources.title: Twelfth Street Players - Chicago Gang History
